component.name: Button
component.description: High-emphasis CTAs: **Semantic/Activity/Note** fill + self-tinted `0px 1px 2px` shadow (`SAVE TO JOB` / `SAVE CHANGES`), **`brandPrimaryXl`** **Brand/Primary** fill with note-colored shadow + **Typography/Metric** 18 uppercase (`END SESSION`), optional paired **delete** control (white, `1px rgba(212,87,42,0.2)`, **Radius/8**, trash **Semantic/Status/Error/Text`).

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Button (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.label: field-book-cta-label (uppercase TEXT in single-button variants; primary side of +Delete)
figmaLayerNames.codeDataNames: `field-book-cta-xl` on XL button; `field-book-cta-with-delete` on the two-button row wrapper.

codeProps.primaryLabel: optional override of default uppercase label

notes: 2026-04-08: `FieldBookCtaButton` in `field-book-cta/` from Figma `1287:1563`; trash is inline SVG to match Edit Session sheet.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1287:1563` â€” `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Structural renames: `field-book-cta-label` on label TEXT nodes; `Button Primary+Delete` frames â†’ `field-book-cta-primary`, `field-book-cta-delete`, `field-book-cta-delete-icon`. Single-TEXT variants (Primary / XL) keep label-only structure. No `flatten()` in automation. `FieldBookCtaButton.tsx` uses `data-name` for primary, XL, with-delete row, label, delete, and delete-icon wrapper.
